hooks.command: echo '=== OpenThai.ai ===' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo 'Backend : cd backend && npm start' && echo 'Frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev' && echo 'MCP     : node mcp-server.js'
UNTRACKED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -c '^'); if [ "$UNTRACKED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[openthai] $UNTRACKED uncommitted change(s) — remember to git add & commit."; fi
